features.description: Object disk metadata parser: all 5 format versions, rewrite, serialize, is_s3_disk

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub fn parse_metadata' src/object_disk.rs && grep -c 'pub fn rewrite_metadata' src/object_disk.rs && grep -c 'pub fn serialize_metadata' src/object_disk.rs && grep -c 'pub fn is_s3_disk' src/object_disk.rs && grep -c 'pub struct ObjectDiskMetadata' src/object_disk.rs && grep -c 'pub struct ObjectRef' src/object_disk.rs
layers.fail_message: Missing one or more public functions/structs in object_disk.rs

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: Object disk metadata parser tests failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Pure parsing module with no runtime behavior -- covered by unit tests

alternative_verification.command: cargo test --lib object_disk -- --test-threads=1 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub async fn copy_object' src/storage/s3.rs && grep -c 'pub async fn copy_object_streaming' src/storage/s3.rs

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: S3 operations require real S3 -- covered by structural and behavioral layers. Integration tests deferred to real infrastructure.

features.description: CLAUDE.md updated for all modified modules

layers.name: structural
layers.command: test -f src/backup/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/upload/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/download/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/restore/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/storage/CLAUDE.md && echo PASS
layers.fail_message: One or more CLAUDE.md files missing

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: grep -q 'S3 disk' src/backup/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'copy_object' src/storage/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'UUID' src/restore/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'CopyObject' src/upload/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'metadata' src/download/CLAUDE.md && echo VALID

alternative_verification.command: test -f src/backup/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/storage/CLAUDE.md && echo DOCS_EXIST
